name: Sol AI Skills Bundle
description: All 8 production Sol AI skills for OpenClaw — one download, install in seconds.

skills.name: Sol Email Agent
skills.description: Automated email that works while you sleep. Real inbox, real replies.

skills.name: Sol Self-Learning
skills.description: Persistent memory and self-improvement for AI agents.

skills.name: Sol Scribe
skills.description: Long-form AI writing with structure, research, and editorial quality.

skills.name: Blog Composer
skills.description: Built by Sol. Manages posts, drafts, tags, images, and publishing workflow.

skills.name: Sol Cal Recovery
skills.description: Recover and repair calendar data. Fix missing events, sync conflicts.

skills.name: Blog Studio
skills.description: Desktop authoring UI for the Sol AI blog.

skills.name: Image Generation Guide
skills.description: Guides for generating images with AI — prompts, tools, workflows.

skills.name: Signet Guide
skills.description: Getting started with Signet AI — setup, configuration, and first runs.
